blockingGaps: Visible fallback art is generated procedural mesh-projection work rather than DCC-authored character art.
Runtime base GLBs are local procedural development rigs, not artist/provider-approved production character assets.

approvalRequirements: Production GLBs are authored/exported from Blender, Maya, Unreal, or equivalent DCC tooling.

Full-body renders are approved as AAA sports-game avatar quality in app framing.
Strict model-pack validation and normal iOS simulator builds pass.
